underlying_goal: Continue developing a Travel Planner app: fix CI failures, implement features (budget alerts), create design documentation and specs, and begin implementing the design system
friction_detail: The migration fix initially used Python 3.10+ type syntax incompatible with CI's Python 3.9, requiring a second fix, and the same CI fix sequence appeared to repeat (possibly context issue).
brief_summary: User needed CI fixes, feature implementation (budget alerts), design documentation/specs, and design system implementation across a long session; most tasks were completed successfully with minor CI compatibility issues.
